title: Model Context Protocol
summary: Model Context Protocol — primary source for agent-era design platform gaps (gap-audit-2026-07).
lessons: Incorporate transferable ai-ui guidance from Model Context Protocol.
Prefer schema/contract-bound generative UI over freeform HTML.
caveats: Verify URL path still resolves; some vendor docs reorganize frequently.
antiImitationNote: Transfer protocols and principles; do not copy proprietary brand systems.
